label: Write your day-3 payment reminder email
use_case: Send this email out 3 days before an appointment to remind customers of their upcoming appointment and the cost.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: Reminder - Your [SERVICE NAME] Appointment on [DATE]
Hi [CUSTOMER NAME],
We just wanted to remind you that you have an appointment at our clinic this coming [DATE] for a [SERVICE NAME]. The cost of the service is $[PRICE]. Please make sure to pay your invoice in full by the day of the appointment. If you need to cancel or reschedule, please do so at least 24 hours in advance.
If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email!
Best regards,
[YOUR COMPANY NAME]

label: Create a text message follow-up for missed appointments
use_case: Set up automated text messages that will be sent out the day after an appointment was scheduled (but not yet missed) to gently remind customers of their upcoming appointment.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: Appointment Reminder - [DATE]
Hi [CUSTOMER NAME],
Just a friendly reminder that you have an appointment at our clinic on [DATE] for a [SERVICE NAME]. If you need to cancel or reschedule, please do so as soon as possible. We look forward to seeing you.
If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this message!
Best regards,
[YOUR COMPANY NAME]

label: Generate a follow-up email for no-shows
use_case: Send out an email the day after a scheduled appointment if the customer did not show up. Offer a discount or promotion as an incentive to reschedule.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: We Missed You - [DATE]
Hi [CUSTOMER NAME],
We noticed that you did not make it to your appointment on [DATE]. We hope everything is okay and we would love to see you again. As a gesture of goodwill, please consider rescheduling for 10% off your next visit.
If you do need to come in, feel free to contact us at any time. Thanks for understanding!
Best regards,
[YOUR COMPANY NAME]

label: Set up automatic appointment reminders via SMS
use_case: Automatically send a text message reminder the day before an appointment to ensure customers don’t forget.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: Appointment Reminder - [DATE]
Hi [CUSTOMER NAME],
Just a friendly reminder that you have an appointment at our clinic on [DATE] for a [SERVICE NAME]. Please make sure to arrive on time.
If you need to cancel or reschedule, please do so as soon as possible. We look forward to seeing you.
Best regards,
[YOUR COMPANY NAME]

label: Create an automated phone call script
use_case: Automate the process of making follow-up calls for no-shows and missed appointments.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Hi [CUSTOMER NAME],
This is a reminder that you had an appointment at our clinic on [DATE]. We hope everything is okay and we would love to see you again. If there was any issue, please let us know so we can help.
If you do need to come in, feel free to contact us at [PHONE NUMBER] or reply to this message.
Thanks for your understanding!
Best regards,
[YOUR COMPANY NAME]
